title: Verdict batch
description: The judge's full response: a JSON array of verdicts, one per refutation in the batch it received. Round 1 runs one judge over all refutations; round 2 runs three judges over the upheld subset and applies a 2-of-3 majority per ref_id. On unrecoverable failure, the judge returns a single-element array carrying an error-form object.

ref_id.description: Stable id of the refutation being judged, echoed from the input batch.

verdict.description: 'upheld' if the refutation is supported by evidence-pack evidence; 'rejected' otherwise.

reason.description: One sentence explaining the decision, citing the specific span or the absence of one.

error.description: Short description of the unrecoverable failure.

examples.reason: Pack section r0 shows the span contradicting decisions[2].
Pack section r1 is SPAN NOT FOUND; unsupported.
